creator: rob@zinkov.com
text:
I'm down with the change.

On Thu, 29 May 2008 21:49:08 +1000
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org> wrote:

> On Wed, May 28, 2008 at 09:15:31PM -0700, Timothy Beyer wrote:
> > At Thu, 29 May 2008 03:50:08 GMT,
> > edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> > > 
> > > Synopsis: Port Fixes and Updated to 4.2.6: lang/gambc
> > > 
> > > State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> > > State-Changed-By: edwin
> > > State-Changed-When: Thu May 29 03:50:08 UTC 2008
> > > State-Changed-Why: 
> > > Awaiting maintainers feedback (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)
> > > 
> > > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=124087
> > 
> > Hi,
> > 
> > I have an additional recommendation for lang/gambc: 
> > 
> > I think that the port name should be changed to lang/gambit-c or
> > lang/gambit_c.  This would be easier for people familiar with the
> > compiler to find, (I actually didn't know the port existed for a
> > while because of the abbreviated name) and the only changes needed
> > would be to change PORTNAME to gambit-c and change the folder name
> > to gambit-c. (I added DISTNAME to deal with this change)
> > 
> > I hope the current maintainer is interested in this idea.
> 
> If so, let me know and I'll get it repocopied first.
> 
> Edwin
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis      |            Personal website:
> http://www.mavetju.org edwin@mavetju.org    |              Weblog:
> http://www.mavetju.org/weblog/
